history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: Two young boys sit side by side in a vehicle, facing the camera while wearing sunglasses.

Main Subject:
The main focus is two boys seated in what appears to be the front or back seat of a car, both wearing dark sunglasses. The left boy is seated closer to the camera, looking forward with his mouth slightly closed, while the right boy sits beside him with his head turned toward the camera and one arm raised across his chest or toward his lap.

Setting:
The scene is indoors or within a vehicle interior, with visible car seats and seatbacks behind them. The lighting appears bright and natural, suggesting daylight filtering into the car. A patterned seat cover is visible in the background on the right side.

Visual Details:
Both boys wear short-sleeved, light-colored plaid shirts. The left boy has short hair and dark sunglasses with a rectangular shape; his posture is upright and still, with his head facing the camera. The right boy also has short hair and dark sunglasses with a similar rectangular shape; he appears to be leaning slightly back, with his raised arm and hand visible in the lower right area of the image. Behind them, a purple bicycle-like frame or object is visible through the car interior space, centered in the background, and a checkered or grid-patterned fabric covers part of the seat behind the right boy. The camera angle is slightly above and to the left, capturing the boys from the front at close range.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image shows two boys wearing sunglasses while seated in a car. The background includes car seats and other objects, including a purple frame-like item.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

Pertanyaan asli user: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

Close-up, eye-level shot of two young boys wearing sunglasses and plaid shirts. The boy on the left is closer to the camera and his face is slightly turned to the right. He has dark hair and is wearing a light-colored plaid shirt with blue, white, and red checkered patterns. The boy on the right is slightly further back and facing forward. He also has dark hair and is wearing a similar plaid shirt. Both boys are wearing dark, wraparound sunglasses that obscure their eyes.

In the background, there's a purple bicycle with a white seat and handlebars. To the right of the bicycle, there's a colorful, patterned fabric hanging, possibly a curtain or bag, with a geometric design in yellow, orange, and black. The overall lighting is somewhat dim and natural, casting soft shadows. The color palette is dominated by the muted tones of the boys' shirts, the dark sunglasses, and the purplish hue of the bicycle, with a pop of color from the background fabric. The mood is casual and playful, with the boys appearing cool and confident in their sunglasses.
